'''vobasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wolfish|wolfish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wolfish|wolfish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vobasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobasithi|vobasithi]] || [[word:vobasiji|vobasiji]] || [[word:vobasishi|vobasishi]] || [[word:vobasiki|vobasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobasuthuthu|vobasuthuthu]] || [[word:vobasujuju|vobasujuju]] || [[word:vobasushushu|vobasushushu]] || [[word:vobasukuku|vobasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobasuthu|vobasuthu]] || [[word:vobasuju|vobasuju]] || [[word:vobasushu|vobasushu]] || [[word:vobasuku|vobasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobasufthuf|vobasufthuf]] || [[word:vobasufjuf|vobasufjuf]] || [[word:vobasufshuf|vobasufshuf]] || [[word:vobasufkuf|vobasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobasethe|vobasethe]] || [[word:vobaseje|vobaseje]] || [[word:vobaseshe|vobaseshe]] || [[word:vobaseke|vobaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobasothotho|vobasothotho]] || [[word:vobasojojo|vobasojojo]] || [[word:vobasoshosho|vobasoshosho]] || [[word:vobasokoko|vobasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobasotho|vobasotho]] || [[word:vobasojo|vobasojo]] || [[word:vobasosho|vobasosho]] || [[word:vobasoko|vobasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobasofthof|vobasofthof]] || [[word:vobasofjof|vobasofjof]] || [[word:vobasofshof|vobasofshof]] || [[word:vobasofkof|vobasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfthÃŸf|vobasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfjÃŸf|vobasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfshÃŸf|vobasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfkÃŸf|vobasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vobasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vobasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vobasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vobasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfthÃŸf|vobasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfjÃŸf|vobasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfshÃŸf|vobasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfkÃŸf|vobasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfthÃŸf|vobasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfjÃŸf|vobasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfshÃŸf|vobasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobasÃŸfkÃŸf|vobasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobasÃḊthÃḊ|vobasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vobasÃḊjÃḊ|vobasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vobasÃḊshÃḊ|vobasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vobasÃḊkÃḊ|vobasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobasathatha|vobasathatha]] || [[word:vobasajaja|vobasajaja]] || [[word:vobasashasha|vobasashasha]] || [[word:vobasakaka|vobasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobasatha|vobasatha]] || [[word:vobasaja|vobasaja]] || [[word:vobasasha|vobasasha]] || [[word:vobasaka|vobasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobasafthaf|vobasafthaf]] || [[word:vobasafjaf|vobasafjaf]] || [[word:vobasafshaf|vobasafshaf]] || [[word:vobasafkaf|vobasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vobasasha|vobasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobashÃḋsha|vobashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobasrosha|vobasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobasmusha|vobasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobasyasha|vobasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobasnkshÃḋsha|govobasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobasnkrosha|govobasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobasnkmusha|govobasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobasnkyasha|govobasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vobabasasha|vobabasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobabashÃḋsha|vobabashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobabasrosha|vobabasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobabasmusha|vobabasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobabasyasha|vobabasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobabasnkshÃḋsha|govobabasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobabasnkrosha|govobabasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobabasnkmusha|govobabasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobabasnkyasha|govobabasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vebÃḊsasha|vebÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vebÃḊshÃḋsha|vebÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vebÃḊsrosha|vebÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vebÃḊsmusha|vebÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vebÃḊsyasha|vebÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govebÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|govebÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govebÃḊsnkrosha|govebÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govebÃḊsnkmusha|govebÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govebÃḊsnkyasha|govebÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vobfasasha|vobfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobfashÃḋsha|vobfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobfasrosha|vobfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobfasmusha|vobfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobfasyasha|vobfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobfasnkshÃḋsha|govobfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobfasnkrosha|govobfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobfasnkmusha|govobfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobfasnkyasha|govobfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
